targets.rawSql:
SELECT
  d.client_member_id                          AS "Member ID",
  d.failure_stage                             AS "Failed Stage",
  d.failure_reason                            AS "Failure Reason",
  d.created_at     AT TIME ZONE 'UTC'         AS "Dead-Lettered At",
  d.retry_count                               AS "Retry Count",
  d.last_retry_at  AT TIME ZONE 'UTC'         AS "Last Retry At",
  d.resolved_at    AT TIME ZONE 'UTC'         AS "Resolved At",
  d.resolution_notes                          AS "Resolution Notes",
  LEFT(d.message_body::text, 300)             AS "Payload Preview",
  d.id                                        AS "Record ID",
  d.correlation_id                            AS "Correlation ID",
  d.batch_file_id                             AS "Batch File ID"
FROM dead_letter_store d
ORDER BY d.created_at DESC
LIMIT 200

SELECT
  f.tenant_id || ' · ' || f.file_type || ' · ' || TO_CHAR(f.arrived_at AT TIME ZONE 'UTC', 'MM-DD HH24:MI') AS "File",
  f.client_id                                 AS "Client",
  f.file_type                                 AS "File Type",
  f.arrived_at     AT TIME ZONE 'UTC'         AS "Arrived At",
  f.status                                    AS "Status",
  f.record_count                              AS "Declared Rows",
  f.malformed_count                           AS "Malformed Rows",
  f.submitted_at   AT TIME ZONE 'UTC'         AS "Submitted At",
  f.updated_at     AT TIME ZONE 'UTC'         AS "Last Updated",
  f.id                                        AS "File ID",
  f.correlation_id                            AS "Correlation ID"
FROM batch_files f
WHERE $__timeFilter(f.arrived_at)
ORDER BY f.arrived_at DESC

SELECT
  r.client_member_id                          AS "Member ID",
  r.record_type                               AS "Record Type",
  r.status                                    AS "Status",
  r.staged_at      AT TIME ZONE 'UTC'         AS "Staged At",
  r.submitted_at   AT TIME ZONE 'UTC'         AS "Submitted At",
  r.completed_at   AT TIME ZONE 'UTC'         AS "Completed At",
  r.sequence_in_file                          AS "Seq #",
  r.fis_result_code                           AS "FIS Result Code",
  r.fis_result_message                        AS "FIS Result Message",
  r.id                                        AS "Record ID",
  r.batch_file_id                             AS "Batch File ID",
  r.correlation_id                            AS "Correlation ID"
FROM batch_records_common r
ORDER BY r.staged_at DESC NULLS LAST
LIMIT 500

SELECT
  f.tenant_id || ' · ' || f.file_type || ' · ' || TO_CHAR(f.arrived_at AT TIME ZONE 'UTC', 'MM-DD HH24:MI') AS "File",
  f.client_id                                 AS "Client",
  f.file_type                                 AS "File Type",
  f.arrived_at     AT TIME ZONE 'UTC'         AS "Arrived At",
  f.status                                    AS "Status",
  f.record_count                              AS "Declared Rows",
  f.malformed_count                           AS "Malformed Rows",
  f.updated_at     AT TIME ZONE 'UTC'         AS "Last Updated",
  f.id                                        AS "File ID",
  f.correlation_id                            AS "Correlation ID"
FROM batch_files f
WHERE f.status != 'COMPLETE'
ORDER BY f.arrived_at DESC

SELECT
  p.client_member_id                          AS "Member ID",
  p.purse_type                                AS "Purse Type",
  p.benefit_type                              AS "Benefit Type",
  p.available_balance_cents                   AS "Balance (cents)",
  p.benefit_period                            AS "Benefit Period",
  p.effective_date                            AS "Effective Date",
  p.expiry_date                               AS "Expiry Date",
  p.fis_purse_name                            AS "FIS Purse Name",
  p.status                                    AS "Status",
  p.activated_at   AT TIME ZONE 'UTC'         AS "Activated At",
  p.id                                        AS "Purse ID",
  p.consumer_id                               AS "Consumer ID"
FROM purses p
WHERE p.status = 'active'
ORDER BY p.activated_at DESC NULLS LAST
LIMIT 500

SELECT
  pg.client_name                              AS "Client",
  pg.subprogram_name                          AS "Subprogram Name",
  pg.benefit_type                             AS "Benefit Type",
  pg.state                                    AS "State",
  pg.is_active                                AS "Active",
  pg.program_start_date                       AS "Start Date",
  pg.fis_pack_id                              AS "Pack ID",
  pg.fis_subprogram_id                        AS "FIS Subprogram ID",
  pg.fis_program_id                           AS "FIS Program ID",
  pg.fis_client_id                            AS "FIS Client ID",
  pg.created_at    AT TIME ZONE 'UTC'         AS "Created At",
  pg.id                                       AS "Program ID"
FROM programs pg
ORDER BY pg.created_at DESC

SELECT
  r.client_member_id                          AS "Member ID",
  r.record_type                               AS "Record Type",
  r.completed_at   AT TIME ZONE 'UTC'         AS "Enrolled At",
  r.sequence_in_file                          AS "Seq #",
  r.fis_result_code                           AS "FIS Result Code",
  r.fis_result_message                        AS "FIS Result Message",
  r.id                                        AS "Record ID",
  r.batch_file_id                             AS "Batch File ID",
  r.correlation_id                            AS "Correlation ID"
FROM batch_records_common r
WHERE r.status = 'enrolled'
ORDER BY r.completed_at DESC NULLS LAST
LIMIT 500

SELECT
  d.client_member_id                          AS "Member ID",
  d.failure_stage                             AS "Failed Stage",
  d.failure_reason                            AS "Failure Reason",
  d.created_at     AT TIME ZONE 'UTC'         AS "Dead-Lettered At",
  d.retry_count                               AS "Retry Count",
  d.last_retry_at  AT TIME ZONE 'UTC'         AS "Last Retry At",
  LEFT(d.message_body::text, 300)             AS "Payload Preview",
  d.id                                        AS "Record ID",
  d.correlation_id                            AS "Correlation ID"
FROM dead_letter_store d
WHERE $__timeFilter(d.created_at)
ORDER BY d.created_at DESC

SELECT
  f.tenant_id || ' · ' || f.file_type || ' · ' || TO_CHAR(f.arrived_at AT TIME ZONE 'UTC', 'MM-DD HH24:MI') AS "File",
  f.client_id                                 AS "Client",
  f.file_type                                 AS "File Type",
  f.arrived_at     AT TIME ZONE 'UTC'         AS "Arrived At",
  f.status                                    AS "Status",
  f.record_count                              AS "Declared Rows",
  f.malformed_count                           AS "Malformed Rows",
  CASE WHEN f.submitted_at IS NOT NULL THEN
    ROUND(EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (f.submitted_at - f.arrived_at))/60.0::numeric, 1)
  END                                         AS "Duration (min)",
  f.submitted_at   AT TIME ZONE 'UTC'         AS "Submitted At",
  f.id                                        AS "File ID",
  f.correlation_id                            AS "Correlation ID"
FROM batch_files f
WHERE $__timeFilter(f.arrived_at)
ORDER BY f.arrived_at DESC

SELECT
  f.client_id                                 AS "Client",
  f.file_type                                 AS "File Type",
  f.arrived_at     AT TIME ZONE 'UTC'         AS "File Arrived",
  f.record_count                              AS "Total Rows in File",
  COUNT(r.id)                                 AS "Rows Enrolled",
  f.id                                        AS "File ID"
FROM batch_files f
LEFT JOIN batch_records_common r
  ON r.batch_file_id = f.id
  AND r.status = 'enrolled'
WHERE $__timeFilter(f.arrived_at)
GROUP BY f.id, f.client_id, f.file_type, f.record_count, f.arrived_at
ORDER BY f.arrived_at DESC

SELECT
  f.tenant_id || ' · ' || f.file_type || ' · ' || TO_CHAR(f.arrived_at AT TIME ZONE 'UTC', 'MM-DD HH24:MI') AS "File",
  f.client_id                                 AS "Client",
  f.file_type                                 AS "File Type",
  f.arrived_at     AT TIME ZONE 'UTC'         AS "Arrived At",
  f.status                                    AS "File Status",
  f.record_count                              AS "Submitted Rows",
  f.malformed_count                           AS "Malformed Rows",
  f.id                                        AS "File ID"
FROM batch_files f
WHERE $__timeFilter(f.arrived_at)
ORDER BY f.arrived_at DESC
